source.caption: Épure e(ii) : changement de plan remplaçant πH. A, B, M, N sont dans un plan de profil (double projection portée par la même verticale) ; la nouvelle ligne de terre L'T' donne la projection auxiliaire H' (πV retenu, hauteurs conservées).

notes: The SVG file wraps the plate in translate(0 720) rotate(-90); the manifest's own 720×510 viewBox is that inner drawing frame. The IR is authored in the SVG FILE's 510×720 viewBox (every coordinate = inner (x,y) mapped by (x,y)→(y,720−x)), because EpurePlate overlays an imageSize-viewBox SVG directly on the raw fig.svg — the overlay only aligns if the IR shares the file's frame. The straightened ground-line endpoint is clipped to the visible viewBox without changing its direction.

Plan de profil : A^V/M^V/B^V/N^V and A^H/N^H/B^H (M^H on the LT) all fall on ONE near-vertical recall line (abscisse commune). The drawn ligne de terre crosses that recall line ~4° off perpendicular, so — as in fig01a/E61 — the ground line is straightened perpendicular to the recall line through the crossing at ~(193,439); calibrating to the skewed drawn LT would manufacture ~24px recall mismatches that are not in the figure. Straightened, uV=uH to <1px for all four points.

replaced 'h' (nouveau plan horizontal πH', πV retenu → hauteurs conservées). The new ligne de terre L'T' is the profile recall line itself (the V projections lie on it); the rappels toward the rabattus H' run perpendicular to it (horizontal on the plate), which forces L'T' vertical — the two parallel obliques are NOT perpendicular to the rappels and are construction/trace lines, not L'T'.
M lies in πV (M^H on the ligne de terre, depth 0), so its auxiliary M^H' sits on L'T' and coincides with M^V — the two labels are drawn side by side.

Auxiliary residual averages ~13px/point (A 11, B 25, N 17, M 0): the plate draws the H' rabattus with depths compressed by ~0.89 (an anisotropy a rigid change of plane cannot produce), so the largest-depth vertex B carries the most slop. Surfaced, not smoothed; the fold direction and every rabattu still reconstruct within the gold tolerance.
